AEMEATH_ECHO_LONG_VOYAGE_STAR.name: Star of the Long Voyage
AEMEATH_ECHO_LONG_VOYAGE_STAR.descriptio: An Aemeath sonata that answers the first guiding star of a long voyage.
AEMEATH_ECHO_LONG_VOYAGE_STAR.breakpoint: 2 pieces: apply 3 Fusion Burst to a random enemy at the start of combat.
3 pieces: additionally gain 3 Sync at the start of combat.
5 pieces: additionally gain 1 Resonance at the start of combat.
